entries.sentence: Tom broke his arm in a cycling accident.
entries.chinese: accident = 事故；汤姆在一次骑车事故中摔断了手臂。

entries.sentence: I have a dull ache in my left shoulder.
entries.chinese: ache = 疼痛；我的左肩隐隐作痛。

entries.sentence: He wore a bandage around his arm.
entries.chinese: arm = 手臂；他的手臂上缠着绷带。

entries.sentence: The nurse took a small sample of blood.
entries.chinese: blood = 血；护士采了一小份血样。

entries.sentence: Your body needs rest after hard exercise.
entries.chinese: body = 身体；剧烈运动后，你的身体需要休息。

entries.sentence: I took your coat by accident because ours look similar.
entries.chinese: by accident = 不小心；我不小心拿了你的外套，因为我们的外套看起来很像。

entries.sentence: This wooden toy was painted by hand.
entries.chinese: by hand = 手工；这个木制玩具是手工上色的。

entries.sentence: The doctor works at a small clinic near the station.
entries.chinese: clinic = 诊所；医生在车站附近的一家小诊所工作。

entries.sentence: The doctor looked inside my ear.
entries.chinese: ear = 耳朵；医生检查了我的耳朵里面。

entries.sentence: Call this number if there is an emergency.
entries.chinese: emergency = 紧急情况；如有紧急情况，请拨打这个号码。

entries.sentence: Something flew into my eye while I was cycling.
entries.chinese: eye = 眼睛；骑车时有东西飞进了我的眼睛。

entries.sentence: Wash your face before you go to bed.
entries.chinese: face = 脸；睡觉前洗脸。

entries.sentence: We discussed the problem face to face.
entries.chinese: face to face = 面对面；我们面对面讨论了这个问题。

entries.sentence: I cut my finger while preparing dinner.
entries.chinese: finger = 手指；准备晚饭时，我割伤了手指。

entries.sentence: These shoes fit me perfectly.
entries.chinese: fit = 合身；这双鞋我穿着正合适。

entries.sentence: I hurt my foot during football practice.
entries.chinese: foot = 脚；足球训练时我伤了脚。

entries.sentence: She joined a swimming club to get fit.
entries.chinese: get fit = 强身健体；她加入游泳俱乐部来增强体质。

entries.sentence: Raise your hand if you know the answer.
entries.chinese: hand = 手；如果你知道答案，请举手。

entries.sentence: The guide used a hand-held radio to call for help.
entries.chinese: hand-held = 手持式的；导游用手持对讲机呼救。

entries.sentence: Please hand in the medical form before Friday.
entries.chinese: hand in = 交上；请在星期五前交上医疗表格。

entries.sentence: The nurse handed out masks at the entrance.
entries.chinese: hand out = 分发；护士在入口处分发口罩。

entries.sentence: Wear a helmet to protect your head.
entries.chinese: head = 头；戴头盔保护头部。

entries.sentence: Regular exercise is good for your health.
entries.chinese: health = 健康；经常锻炼对健康有益。

entries.sentence: A healthy breakfast gives me energy for school.
entries.chinese: healthy = 健康的；健康的早餐让我有精力上学。

entries.sentence: Exercise makes your heart stronger.
entries.chinese: heart = 心脏；锻炼能让你的心脏更强健。

entries.sentence: She was taken to hospital after the accident.
entries.chinese: hospital = 医院；事故发生后，她被送往医院。

entries.sentence: My knee still hurts when I climb stairs.
entries.chinese: hurt = 疼；我爬楼梯时膝盖仍然会疼。

entries.sentence: Leo stayed home because he was ill.
entries.chinese: ill = 生病的；利奥因为生病待在家里。

entries.sentence: I fell and hurt my knee.
entries.chinese: knee = 膝盖；我摔倒伤了膝盖。

entries.sentence: Use the left-hand door to enter the clinic.
entries.chinese: left-hand = 左边的；请从左边的门进入诊所。

entries.sentence: Her leg was sore after the long run.
entries.chinese: leg = 腿；长跑后她的腿很酸痛。

entries.sentence: Take this medicine after breakfast.
entries.chinese: medicine = 药；早餐后服用这种药。

entries.sentence: Cover your mouth when you cough.
entries.chinese: mouth = 嘴；咳嗽时请捂住嘴。

entries.sentence: My neck felt stiff after the long journey.
entries.chinese: neck = 脖子；长途旅行后我的脖子很僵硬。

entries.sentence: My nose is blocked because I have a cold.
entries.chinese: nose = 鼻子；我感冒了，所以鼻子不通气。

entries.sentence: The clinic is close enough to reach on foot.
entries.chinese: on foot = 步行；诊所很近，可以步行到达。

entries.sentence: Tell the doctor where you feel the pain.
entries.chinese: pain = 疼痛；告诉医生你哪里疼。

entries.sentence: The pregnant woman was offered a seat on the bus.
entries.chinese: pregnant = 怀孕的；公交车上有人给那位孕妇让座。

entries.sentence: The mountain rescue team found the injured walker.
entries.chinese: rescue = 救援；山地救援队找到了受伤的徒步者。

entries.sentence: The pharmacy is on the right-hand side of the road.
entries.chinese: right-hand = 右边的；药店在道路右侧。

entries.sentence: I bought a second-hand bicycle from my neighbour.
entries.chinese: second-hand = 二手的；我从邻居那里买了一辆二手自行车。

entries.sentence: I carried the bag over my shoulder.
entries.chinese: shoulder = 肩膀；我把包挎在肩上。

entries.sentence: I felt sick after eating too much cake.
entries.chinese: sick = 恶心的；吃了太多蛋糕后，我觉得恶心。

entries.sentence: I had a stomach ache after lunch.
entries.chinese: stomach ache = 胃痛；午饭后我胃疼。

entries.sentence: I need to see a dentist because my tooth hurts.
entries.chinese: tooth = 牙齿；我的牙疼，需要去看牙医。

entries.sentence: The cut was painful for several days.
entries.chinese: painful = 疼痛的；这个伤口疼了好几天。

entries.sentence: The patient waited quietly to see the doctor.
entries.chinese: patient = 病人；病人安静地等着看医生。

entries.sentence: My throat is sore, so it hurts to speak.
entries.chinese: sore = 疼痛的；我喉咙痛，说话也疼。

entries.sentence: I felt unfit after months without exercise.
entries.chinese: unfit = 身体不健康的；几个月没锻炼后，我觉得身体状态很差。

entries.sentence: Sara felt unwell and went home early.
entries.chinese: unwell = 身体不适的；萨拉觉得不舒服，提前回家了。
